# Automation & Integration Toolkit

This directory contains utility scripts, templates, backups, and static resources used to synchronize and manage n8n workflows and related browser tools for the PapyConnect and CV-Factory stacks.

## File Reference

### ⚙️ Configuration & Credentials
* **`.env`**
  Stores environment variables containing API keys, webhook tokens, base URLs, and target workflow IDs for both local development (`localhost:5678`) and remote NAS (`gronas:5678`) environments.
  * *Note: A template can be generated by running `python3 toolkit/sync_n8n.py --init-env`.*

### 🐍 Scripts & Tools
* **`sync_n8n.py`**
  The primary unified automation script for workflow lifecycle management. Key capabilities:
  * `--backup-all`: Downloads all current workflows from the active n8n instance.
  * `--push-all`: Pushes/syncs local workflow JSON files to the active n8n instance.
  * `--fix`: Rewrites and fixes Javascript code node syntax blocks (such as newline splitting issues).
  * `--init-env`: Generates a template `.env` configuration file.
* **`download_workflows.py`**
  *Deprecated.* A legacy convenience wrapper that redirects arguments to `sync_n8n.py --backup-all`.
* **`debug_compare.py`**
  A debugging helper used to verify that the Javascript code embedded inside `sync_n8n.py` matches the active code block defined in `workflow_backup.json`.

### 🌐 Web & Browser Utilities
* **`bookmarklet.js`**
  A browser bookmarklet template. It extracts job details (title, company, URL, selection/description) from active job portals (like LinkedIn) and passes them to the n8n webhook routing endpoints.
* **`inlined_fonts.css`**
  A heavy CSS stylesheet containing base64-encoded fonts (such as Inter and Outfit) to ensure standalone PDF exports compile and render accurately without relying on external CDN network requests.

### 📦 Backup & Template JSONs
* **`workflow_backup.json`**
  A backup export file of the primary cv-generation n8n workflow.
* **`error_workflow.json`**
  An export of the error-handling workflow used to monitor execution failures and route logs.
